title: Satin Silk Complete Bedding Set - 6 PCS - Fitted sheet, Duvet Cover, 4 Pillow Cases. Color - Mink Size - King
features: 💫 Luxury Feel: Experience hotel-style elegance at home with our 6-piece satin bedding set. Includes: 1 fitted sheet, 1 duvet cover, and 4 pillowcases (Single size includes 2 pillowcases). Designed with a silky-smooth finish for a touch of glamour and lasting comfort.

🌟 Premium Quality: Crafted from high-quality polyester satin – soft, breathable, and smooth to the touch. A luxurious choice that enhances comfort while adding a sophisticated sheen to your bedroom décor.

📏 Perfect Fit: Single – (Duvet: 135x198cm, Sheet: 90x190cm, 2 Pillowcases) Double – (Duvet: 198x198cm, Sheet: 137x190cm, 4 Pillowcases) King – (Duvet: 228x218cm, Sheet: 152x200cm, 4 Pillowcases) Super King – (Duvet: 260x228cm, Sheet: 198x200cm, 4 Pillowcases) Deep-pocket fitted sheet fits mattresses up to 25cm.
🎁 Gift Ready: Perfect for birthdays, weddings, and housewarming gifts. The elegant satin finish and thoughtful packaging make this bedding set a delightful surprise for loved ones.
🧺 Easy Care: Machine washable at 40°C. Wash dark colours separately. First wash recommended without detergent. Avoid bleach and iron at low temperature to maintain fabric quality.
description: Product Description Duvet Cover (Zip Closure) Convenient and secure zip closure keeps your duvet in place all night. Simple to remove and wash, making maintenance quick and easy . Pillowcases (Envelope Closure) Effortlessly slide your pillows in and out while keeping them protected and neatly tucked. Envelope closure keeps your pillows securely inside, offering a neat, sleek finish . Fitted Sheet (Fully Elasticated) Snug fit ensures the sheet stays in place on various mattress depths. Fully elasticated edges provide easy installation and a wrinkle-free look. Premium Silk Satin Fabric Enjoy the ultra-soft, luxurious feel of silk satin that’s gentle on your skin and hair. Helps reduce friction, minimizing hair breakage and wrinkles. All-Season Breathability Temperature Regulating : Satin naturally helps maintain a comfortable sleep environment cool in summer and warm in winter. Lightweight & Airy : Experience a restful night, free from overheating or excessive perspiration. Complete 6-Piece Set Single Size : 1 Duvet Cover (Zip Closure) + 1 Fitted Sheet (Fully Elasticated) + 2 Pillowcases (Envelope Closure) Double, King & Super King : 1 Duvet Cover + 1 Fitted Sheet + 4 Pillowcases How to Care for Your Satin Bedding Wash in Cool Water : Gentle cycle recommended, using mild detergent. Avoid Bleach : Harsh chemicals can damage the fibers and dull the fabric’s shine. Low Tumble Dry or Hang Dry : Helps maintain fabric softness and integrity. Light Iron if Needed : Use a cool iron setting to preserve the satin’s smooth finish. Single Duvet Cover: 135 x 200 cm (Approx.) Fitted Sheet: 90 x 190 + 30 cm (Approx.) Pillowcases: 50 x 75 cm (2 Pieces) Double Duvet Cover: 200 x 200 cm (Approx.) Fitted Sheet: 135 x 190 + 30 cm (Approx.) Pillowcases: 50 x 75 cm (4 Pieces) King Duvet Cover: 230 x 220 cm (Approx.) Fitted Sheet: 150 x 200 + 30 cm (Approx.) Pillowcases: 50 x 75 cm (4 Pieces) Super King Duvet Cover: 260 x 220 cm (Approx.) Fitted Sheet: 180 x 200 + 30 cm (Approx.) Pillowcases: 50 x 75 cm (4 Pieces) Single Double King Super King
